name: Easy Does It Radio Program
notes:
The Easy Does It Radio Program is a way for A.A. in Cincinnati to help carry the message to the Alcoholic who still suffers through its Public Information Committee.

It is a production of the Greater Cincinnati Intergroup and hosted by A.A. members who will share their Experience, Strength & Hope on WAIF 88.3 FM or streaming on waifradio.org/listen or download the WAIF Radio app on the Google Play Store or the Apple App store. 

You may call into the Easy Does It Radio Program at 513-961-8900 to share from wherever you are. Shy about calling in? You may also email the radio show at easydoesitradioprogram@gmail.com.
